heroImageAlt: A quiet, caring conversation with a member of our counselling team
heroShortDescription: Compassionate support for individuals, families and carers through every stage of your journey.
mainIntro1: Our counselling sessions are available to any individual, carer or family member that is living with or caring for someone with a palliative condition.
mainIntro2: Our qualified counsellors are on hand to listen to anyone who feels they might benefit from a safe, confidential space to talk. Conversations are welcome around any aspect of life (whether related to the diagnosis or not) offering an opportunity to help individuals feel heard and making sure they do not have to face a difficult time alone.
emotionalIntro: Our team offers a calm and compassionate space to talk through worries, feelings and questions. This may include:

emotionalList.text: support for family members and carers
techniques to support mental health & wellbeing
space to talk before or after a bereavement

practicalBody: Alongside emotional support, we can help families understand what support may be available locally. This may include links to other counselling provision, spiritual care, community support, or other organisations that can help with specific needs.
referralIntro: To make a referral to our hospice please complete the
referralOutro: and a member of our team will be in touch with you to discuss in more detail.
sideFormHint: Enquire about counselling or make a referral.
